ignoreIssues: Replace array parameter $fileData with a DTO class. The array is accessed with string keys (name, type, size, tmp_name, error), which suggests a structured data type is more appropriate.
Rename Method getBool() to sX(), hasX(), etc. or a similar boolean prefix (is, has, can). Methods returning bool should indicate their result via their name.
Rename Method all() to start with an imperative verb. Method names should describe the action being performed.
Remove or inline variable "_GET" in function "fromGlobals()"; it is referenced only once.
Remove or inline variable "_POST" in function "fromGlobals()"; it is referenced only once.
Remove or inline variable "_SERVER" in function "fromGlobals()"; it is referenced only once.
Remove or inline variable "_COOKIE" in function "fromGlobals()"; it is referenced only once.
Remove or inline variable "_FILES" in function "fromGlobals()"; it is referenced only once.
Move superglobal $_GET access out of class Request. Superglobals should only be accessed in the global scope or within classes ending in Controller or Middleware to ensure proper encapsulation.
Move superglobal $_POST access out of class Request. Superglobals should only be accessed in the global scope or within classes ending in Controller or Middleware to ensure proper encapsulation.
Move superglobal $_SERVER access out of class Request. Superglobals should only be accessed in the global scope or within classes ending in Controller or Middleware to ensure proper encapsulation.
Move superglobal $_COOKIE access out of class Request. Superglobals should only be accessed in the global scope or within classes ending in Controller or Middleware to ensure proper encapsulation.
Move superglobal $_FILES access out of class Request. Superglobals should only be accessed in the global scope or within classes ending in Controller or Middleware to ensure proper encapsulation.
